name: chart-radar-grid-custom
visual_summary: Radar Chart Grid Custom is a customizable chart component that displays a grid-based radar chart. It's ideal for visualizing complex data in a concise and intuitive manner, making it perfect for dashboard builders and data analysts. Use it when needing to compare multiple data sets across multiple categories.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready chart component with the following characteristics:

Name: chart-radar-grid-custom
Description: Radar Chart Grid Custom is a customizable chart component that displays a grid-based radar chart. It's ideal for visualizing complex data in a concise and intuitive manner, making it perfect for dashboard builders and data analysts. Use it when needing to compare multiple data sets across multiple categories.
Style: dark, material, minimal
Interactions: hover, clickable
Tags: chart, radar chart, grid, customizable, dashboard, data visualization

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
